name: La Guaira (Venezuela)
description: At the hoist, white over blue bands bearing a red-edged yellow sun and four white stars; at the fly, four vertical bands of yellow, red, white and blue. Based on the flag of Espana and Gual.
history: Adopted in 1999. The state was known as Vargas until 2019.

features.role: hoist half white over blue; fly half four vertical bands of yellow, red, white and blue
red-edged yellow sun on the white band
four white stars on the blue band
